name: Linear
notes: Popular B2B SaaS — lots of public data, recent news, clear tech stack. Should score high on all dimensions.

name: Stripe
notes: Large company with lots of press coverage. Tests that agent handles information density well and doesn't hallucinate specific financials.

name: Freehand
notes: Smaller / less-covered company. Tests graceful degradation — agent should still produce a useful brief with limited source material.
